scripts.build: tsc --project tsconfig.json && esbuild src/handlers/websocket-sync.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --external:@aws-sdk/client-dynamodb --external:@aws-sdk/client-apigatewaymanagementapi --outfile=../../.build/handlers/websocket-sync.js && esbuild src/handlers/delete-jobs-changes.ts src/handlers/get-admin-llm-costs.ts src/handlers/get-jobs.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-blocks.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-changes.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-export-docx.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-fields.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-files.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-gap-report.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-logs.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-output.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-refinements.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-template-slots.ts src/handlers/get-jobs-template-zones.ts src/handlers/merge-yjs-snapshot.ts src/handlers/patch-jobs-refine-accept.ts src/handlers/patch-jobs-refine-reject.ts src/handlers/patch-jobs-template-zones.ts src/handlers/post-jobs.ts src/handlers/post-jobs-attorney-judgment.ts src/handlers/post-jobs-documents-ingest.ts src/handlers/post-jobs-export-docx.ts src/handlers/post-jobs-extract.ts src/handlers/post-jobs-files.ts src/handlers/post-jobs-generate.ts src/handlers/post-jobs-refine.ts src/handlers/post-jobs-templates-classify.ts src/handlers/post-jobs-templates-inject.ts src/handlers/post-jobs-templates-segment.ts src/handlers/sns-textract-completion.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --external:@prisma/client --outdir=../../.build/handlers/
